published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML / ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO / ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: fixed-overlap orthogonal-score common-EIF inference

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md ExactID catalogue empty; closest eid_bjs_efficient_event_study concerns panel event-study IF equivalence, not ATE weak-overlap studentization

published_prior_art.cite: Dorn2025WeakOverlapTStats and MaSantAnnaSasakiUra2026WeakOverlapDR are closest but do not compare DML/LRO/ADML studentizers through S_n
BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW: linear augmented-balancing/AutoDML equivalences, not a weak-overlap three-studentizer witness

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The iff boundary for max_m |T_m-T_A| is stated using lambda_min^+(S_n), but max pairwise equivalence is governed by the largest active singular/eigen scale or by explicit rates for s_DA,n and s_LA,n; unequal eigenvalue rates make the stated frontier under-specified.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: S_n is advertised as computable, but the LRO summand chi_L and ADML robust augmentation kappa_A are named only by citation, not by formula; the finite-support witness cannot be checked without exact variance-score summands.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace lambda_min^+(S_n) in the equivalence frontier with max{s_DA,n,s_LA,n} or lambda_max(S_n), or add an explicit equal-rate spectral condition tying every active pairwise singular value to n^{-zeta}.

Write the LRO first-step-adjusted variance summand and ADML kappa_A robust-variance augmentation explicitly for the binary ATE case, so S_n and the three-point witness are primitive objects rather than citation-dependent placeholders.
Add a boundary corollary for one inactive pair, e.g. s_DA,n>0 and s_LA,n=0, to show the frontier handles partial separation rather than only full two-dimensional activity.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Conjecture 1 spectral scale and make the LRO/ADML variance-score summands explicit before sending the proposal back to novelty review.
